title: 212: The Power of Love
overview: After the funeral of his mother, Rahmat, a magazine journalist, goes back to Jakarta. He then learned that his dad, Ki Zainal, along with the locals of his hometown of Ciamis, will rally to Jakarta as part of the 2 December acts.
